160 BHRIGU NANDI NADI

father had two wives. The father mar
ried a second time after his first wife died. The father had children from the

The native's father will die when the native's age will be 37
years. During the native's 43rd year, there will be quarrels in the family
over the lands and other properties left by the father. A daughter also
will put in her claim.
